description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. The figure wears a fitted jacket and matching trousers, with gloves covering both hands and formal shoes on the feet. The head is covered by a tight-fitting mask or balaclava, leaving only the facial features exposed, and the face is adorned with a mustache and goatee. The overall build is slender and upright, with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The clothing appears tailored and the figure exudes a professional, somewhat mysterious demeanor, reminiscent of a secret agent or undercover operative.
description: A stylized adult male in a formal business suit, gloves, and mask, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has a professional and mysterious appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, tie, gloves, mask, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the mask, suit, and gloves, with the arm extended forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, trousers, and gloves, with both arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the mask, suit, and gloves, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt, tie, gloves, and mask
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: head fully covered by a mask
